meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Template to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship a revenue-ready SaaS MVP in under an hour.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap stalls founders, not by lack of talent, but by lack of momentum. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you bypass boilerplate fatigue. Use Claude Code to scaffold a production-ready SaaS, transforming abstract ideas into a live, monetizable asset that proves your technical authority to potential clients.
content.intro:
You are staring at a blank screen, the silence of 'zero traction' echoing in your inbox. Every potential client asks for a portfolio, and you have nothing to show but high-intent ambition and a folder of half-finished scripts. The market doesn't care about your potential; it cares about proof of execution.

Stop waiting for the perfect project to fall into your lap. We are going to manufacture authority. By utilizing the Antigravity project template, we turn the 'no portfolio' problem into a 'shipping' reality. This isn't just about code; it's about building a tangible, revenue-generating asset that turns skeptics into paying customers.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffolding
steps.description: Establish the foundational architecture. This step ensures your project has the necessary SaaS boilerplate—auth, database, and billing—baked in from minute one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a high-conversion SaaS boilerplate with Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase integration. Include a landing page, user dashboard, and Stripe payment flow setup.

steps.title: Define the Revenue Engine
steps.description: Configure the database schema to track user activity and revenue metrics. This proves you are building for profit, not just for play.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Supabase schema for a subscription-based SaaS. Include tables for 'profiles', 'projects', and 'subscriptions' with row-level security enabled.

steps.title: Implement the Core Value Proposition
steps.description: Build the 'killer feature' that solves a specific, painful problem for your target audience, ensuring your portfolio piece is actually useful.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a functional AI-driven utility that solves [Insert Niche Problem]. Ensure it integrates with OpenAI API and stores outputs in the 'projects' table.

steps.title: Optimize for Conversion
steps.description: Polish the UI/UX. A portfolio piece that looks amateurish is worse than having no portfolio at all. Focus on professional aesthetics.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refine the Tailwind CSS components for the landing page. Add high-contrast CTA buttons and a responsive pricing table that emphasizes the 'Pro' tier.

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Push your project to a live URL. Nothing validates a founder's capability faster than a link that anyone can click and test.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Prepare the project for Vercel deployment. Ensure environment variables are mapped and build logs are clear for production deployment.

pro_tips: Treat your GitHub repo like a public product; document the 'why' behind your architecture in the README to show business maturity.
Always include a 'Request a Feature' button in your MVP—it creates an instant feedback loop with potential customers.
Prioritize load speed over complex animations; founders with fast, functional sites get hired faster than those with flashy, slow ones.
Use your own SaaS to solve one of your own daily tasks; you’ll find bugs faster and build genuine passion into the pitch.
Keep your database schema lean; over-engineering is the fastest way to kill a project's momentum before it hits the market.
content.next_steps: After your MVP is live, identify three potential customers in your niche, send them your live link, and ask for a 10-minute feedback call to validate your pricing model.
content.conversion_block: You now have a live, professional SaaS project that proves your capability to build, deploy, and monetize. This is the ultimate antidote to the 'no portfolio' syndrome. Stop thinking and start shipping. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
